case_title: LAW OFFICES OF NANCY A FELLOM VS TURCIOS SILVIO J

docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT TURCIOS SILVIO J HEARING SET FOR NOV-17-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAW OFFICES OF NANCY A FELLOM IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TURCIOS SILVIO J STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAW OFFICES OF NANCY A FELLOM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TURCIOS SILVIO J $349.00 PRINCIPAL, $28.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $377.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
